Appearances:
Plaintiff, McCormack Baron Ragan Management is present. Represented by Gina Guittron.
Attorney, Paul Singer, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Anthony Jones, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem C. Zadik Shapiro, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-16-2010 is vacated.
